summary: Completed comprehensive testing of guitar pickup comparison widget. All critical features working correctly including the core playhead synchronization functionality. Backend APIs functional with minor issue. Frontend design and functionality excellent.

minor_bugs.issue: Individual track GET endpoint not implemented - returns 405 Method Not Allowed instead of 404
minor_bugs.impact: Minor - not used by frontend, only affects direct API access

design_issues.issue: Body background is white instead of dark #121212 as specified in design guidelines

minor_warnings.issue: Console warnings about missing Description for DialogContent

passed_tests: Backend API: GET /api/tracks returns all tracks (4 seed tracks found)
Backend API: POST /api/tracks creates new track successfully
Backend API: PUT /api/tracks/{id} updates existing track
Backend API: DELETE /api/tracks/{id} deletes track
Viewer Widget: Displays all tracks in scrollable list (max-height 400px)
Viewer Widget: Shows current track image, title, and description in header
Viewer Widget: Play/pause button toggles audio playback correctly
Viewer Widget: Progress bar updates during playback and allows seeking
CRITICAL: Playhead sync working perfectly (1.18s difference, well within tolerance)
Viewer Widget: Active track shows red highlight (#d62028) and left border
Viewer Widget: Playing indicator (animated waves) shows on active playing track
Viewer Widget: Admin Panel link navigates to /admin
Admin Dashboard: Displays all tracks in table with thumbnails
Admin Dashboard: Add Track button opens dialog with form
Admin Dashboard: Form creates new track when submitted
Admin Dashboard: View Widget button navigates to /
Design: Red accent color #d62028 correctly used for buttons, progress bar, active states
Design: Sans serif fonts applied (Manrope for headings, IBM Plex Sans for body)
Design: Widget background #1C1C1C and surface colors correct
Design: Scrollable track list with custom scrollbar styling
Design: Responsive design working on mobile (390px width)
All required data-testid attributes present and functional
Track switching preserves playhead position across all 5 tracks
Progress bar seeking functionality working correctly
Time display showing current time and duration correctly
No JavaScript errors found during testing
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix body background color to use #121212 instead of white. Consider adding individual track GET endpoint for API completeness.
